reviews.comment:
La verdad que no entiendo por qué no se puede retirar dinero. Tengo entendido que todas las estaciones YPF cuentan con ese servicio. Estoy en viaje y era inportante por contar con efectivo

(Translated by Google)
I honestly don't understand why you can't withdraw cash. I understand that all YPF stations offer this service. I'm traveling, and it was important to have cash.

reviews.comment:
mala atenciòn, es un lugar donde normalmente llegas con el auto resucio por los caminos de ripio, estàn los cepillos y agua para limpiar el parabrisas pero los playeros no lo hacen.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service; it's a place where you usually arrive with your car covered in dust from the gravel roads. There are brushes and water to clean the windshield, but the attendants don't use them.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, limpio, ordenado y bien cuidado. A la noche hubo cantidad de autos para cargar combustible y sólo dos personas atendiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean, tidy, and well-maintained. At night there were many cars waiting to refuel, but only two people were working.
